label: Market Intelligence
description: Analyze market opportunities and recommend product categories based on growth trends, demand signals, and competitive landscape.

defaultOutputs.name: PDF URL
defaultOutputs.description: s3 URI of the PDF report

configSchema.label: Therapeutic Purpose
configSchema.placeholder: e.g. anti hair loss, obesity, cancer
configSchema.description: The therapeutic area to research (e.g. anti hair loss, obesity, cancer)

configSchema.label: Is Drug
configSchema.description: If true, search for pharmaceutical drugs; if false, search for consumer products

configSchema.label: Market
configSchema.description: Target market to focus on (e.g. EU, Asia, US)

configSchema.label: Product Formulation
configSchema.description: Product formulation type (e.g. oil, serum, tablet)
